Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

Instead of changing lqe_getref/putref with kref_get/put everywhere you could change several lines in lqe_getref/putref. Otherwise:
1. loosing existed assertions in lqe_getref/putref
2. debugging: it is hard to add any debug lines to catch the problems with lqe references. Now it is enough to add a line into lqe_getref/putref, instead of adding such lines around the whole code.
3. It would be much easier to change kref_get/put with something better in the future, if required.
4. The patch would be smaller.
Uploaded patch set 6.

commit.subject: LU-16796 quota: Change struct lquota_entry to use kref
commit.message:
LU-16796 quota: Change struct lquota_entry to use kref

This patch changes struct lquota_entry to use
kref instead of atomic_t
